_comment: Fill Light Presets Registry — Luma & the Glitchkin
_note: All cx/cy positions are fractional (0.0–1.0) unless pos_mode is 'absolute'. source_dx/source_dy are fractions of char_h.

SF01._description: The Discovery — Luma notices Byte on the CRT. Warm domestic interior, real-world palette.

lights.label: luma_warm_lamp
lights._note: SUNLIT_AMBER warm lamp fill from upper-left (lamp off-screen left)

lights.label: luma_crt_bounce
lights._note: BYTE_TEAL CRT bounce from right — CRT screen is primary discovery source

SF02._description: Glitch Storm — Sprint scene, 3 characters. HOT_MAGENTA fill from storm crack at upper-right.

lights.label: luma
lights._note: HOT_MAGENTA fill from storm crack upper-right

lights.label: byte
lights._note: HOT_MAGENTA fill from storm crack upper-right

lights.label: cosmo
lights._note: HOT_MAGENTA fill from storm crack upper-right

SF03._description: The Other Side — Digital void environment. UV_PURPLE ambient fill from upper void.

lights.label: luma
lights._note: UV_PURPLE ambient fill from void sky above

lights.label: byte
lights._note: ELECTRIC_CYAN bounce fill — Byte is lit from within in the Other Side

SF04._description: The Dynamic — Luma and Byte interaction. CRT monitor as fill light source on Byte's left side.

lights.label: luma_monitor_bounce
lights._note: BYTE_TEAL monitor bounce on Luma's right-facing side from CRT on right

lights.label: byte_self_glow
lights._note: ELECTRIC_CYAN self-emission fill — Byte's monitor screen emits ambient glow
